description: Due to increased productivity, the terminal can handle more trucks. The gate manager decides to release more appointment slots.

nodes.task_description: Analyze current truck turnaround times and gate queue lengths.

expected_outcome.value: Manager notes that turnaround times are low and there are no queues, indicating spare capacity.

nodes.task_description: Decide to release an additional 20 appointment slots per hour for the next 4 hours.

expected_outcome.value: A decision is made to increase capacity.

nodes.task_description: Update the Vehicle Booking System (VBS) to make the new slots available to trucking companies.

expected_outcome.value: The new slots are successfully added to the VBS and become available for booking.
